completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part. Web app: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 7 + Supabase
Tech stack: React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Vite 7 + Supabase + CSS Modules. Architecture: Component-based SPA with state machine navigation

Conditional analysis complete: API contracts (Supabase hooks), data models (5 tables), component inventory (23 components), state management (useReducer state machine + localStorage), config/auth/CI/shared code documented. 4 files written.
Source tree documented: ~110 files, 9 critical folders, 7 entry points.
Dev guide and deployment guide written.
Architecture document written with system diagram, 5-layer architecture, state machine, security model.
Project overview written. All 9 supporting docs verified on disk.
Master index.md generated with links to all docs and AI-assisted development guide.
Validation complete. All checklist items passed. No incomplete markers. No critical issues.
Workflow complete. 10 documentation files generated (1,435 lines total).

findings.project_classification: Monolith web app, React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Supabase, CSS Modules, react-router-dom
findings.technology_stack: React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Vite 7 + Supabase + CSS Modules + react-router-dom
findings.conditional_analysis: APIs: 12 hooks (6 read, 3 mutation, 3 admin CRUD). Data: 5 tables. Components: 23 total. State: useReducer 4-phase machine + localStorage.
